title: Petersburg Borough Assembly to take testimony on a second application to buy Borough-owned tidelands
summary: Petersburg’s Municipal Building, which contains the Borough Assembly Chambers. (Photo by Shelby Herbert/KFSK) Petersburg’s Borough Assembly has a long agenda ahead of its noon meeting today.
